title: quarto_bug
text: Mermaid diagrams do not render if, when in a {.tabset-panel}, they are not placed in the first tab. See Mermaid Broken for an example of this. If the Mermaid diagram is placed in the first tab, it renders correctly. See Mermaid Working for an example of this.
